missions.title: Electrostatics - Section 1
missions.description: Comprehensive analysis covering charge, conservation of charge, quantisation and more.

microtargets.title: Charge
mustKnowFacts: Charge is a fundamental subtopic of Electrostatics.
Crucial to understand the principles governing Charge for NEET.
commonTraps: Students often misinterpret Charge during complex MCQs.
Failing to apply the correct logic for Charge.
masteryCriteria: Can accurately solve numericals or identify structures related to Charge.
pyqPatterns: Past year questions frequently ask about Charge.

activeRecallQuestions.question: Explain the core concept behind Charge.
What is a common trap associated with Charge?
